name: Unisex Premium Graphic Tee
description: Soft 100% organic cotton graphic tee with oversized fit, double-stitched seams, and pre-washed finish.

specifications.value: White, Black, Vintage Grey, Sage, Dusty Rose
Machine Wash Cold, Tumble Dry Low

reviews.title: Best T-shirt quality for the price
reviews.reviewText: The fabric is thick, soft, and doesn't feel cheap. Oversized fit is exactly right — not too baggy. The graphic is clear and hasn't faded at all after multiple washes. I will buy more colours.

reviews.title: Comfortable and well-made tee
reviews.reviewText: Really like the weight of the fabric and the organic cotton feel. Washed well. Oversized fit is flattering. The print could be slightly larger but overall very pleased.

reviews.title: Great everyday T-shirt
reviews.reviewText: Comfortable from the first wear without needing to break in. The double stitched seams are a nice quality touch. Highly recommend as a wardrobe staple.
